raw_consumer_statement:
I used my credit card to charge a vacation at the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. The owed balance Is XXXX I was charged XXXX. 
First I tried to resolve with the hotel we could not communicate properly. 
Then I decided to dispute with credit card company. 
They did the investigation and even got a response from hard rock that I owed XXXX and still closed the investigation. I faxed them to appeal that they did not correct the difference. And they stated fax was not working. Then they escalated my dispute they call me and leave me message and no return number. So they send me a letter that they tried contacting me unsuccessfully. 
This has been ongoing and there is no way to resolve this the communication other than with customer service rep is non existent.
